stemHtml: Which statement best describes the NACA-6 series air foil type?

options.a: It is an air foil designed for high-speed supersonic flight and helps minimize shock wave generation.
options.b: It is an air foil optimized for high-speed flight, with an emphasis on low-speed controllability.
options.c: It is an air foil specifically designed for low-speed performance and efficient lift generation.
options.d: It is an air foil designed for subsonic flight with an emphasis on drag reduction.
